scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix proxy && npm install --prefix llm-worker && npm install --prefix dashboard/server && npm install --prefix dashboard/client && npm install --prefix demo-app
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "proxy,worker,dash-server,dash-client,demo" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue" "npm run dev --prefix proxy" "npm run dev --prefix llm-worker" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/server" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard/client" "npm run dev --prefix demo-app"
